notes: Phase 16c locked floor. Current measured score is 100% on the five
files in stryker.config.json.mutate. We commit minScore=95 — five
points of headroom for routine refactors. Drop a mutation-test gap
(a survivor) below 95% and CI fails with a clear diff.
To raise the floor: run `pnpm mutate`, confirm the new score, bump
this file in the same PR. To lower it: explain why in the PR body.
